Next steps

If you landed here from an email, you’re in the right place.

  1. Check your email for the onboarding sequence.
  2. Save this page for reference.
  3. If anything breaks, reply to the invite email and we’ll fix it fast.

Note: This is early access. Features may change as we ship.
